rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks within valid component type or implementation scopes based on the scope of the declared elements
Use assume/guarantee syntax for component type contracts and assign for implementation-level output bindings
generic_rules: Only reference visible identifiers in AGREE expressions; avoid AADL property names as direct variables
Declare constants and equations with correct AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool)
Use value_in_range patterns for numeric bounds in assumptions and guarantees
Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope; use assign for output bindings
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Assumptions and guarantees must be labeled with quoted strings
Assignments must reference existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Period or Deadline directly in AGREE expressions
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use assign for output bindings
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as direct AGREE variables
Component type vs implementation scope distinctions beyond contract placement
Validator diagnostics for type mismatches in AGREE expressions
